parts.text: I uploaded some notes about Biology. Can you give me a quiz?

input.text: Biology notes: Photosynthesis is the process used by plants to turn sunlight into energy. Mitochondria is the powerhouse of the cell.

parts.text: I only scored 1 out of 5 on my latest quiz. I need a revision plan to help me study better.

input.text: Cell division and mitosis are confusing for me.

parts.text: Here are my notes for the upcoming test.

input.text: Student Name: [[STUDENT_NAME]]. Email: test@example.com. ID: 123456789. History notes: World War II started in 1939.
